inputs: SRR24043307-2GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz SRR24043307-5GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz SRR24043307-10GB GRCh38.p14.gbff.gz

metrics.command_line: ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/4/d/3/dataset_4d338113-dde2-4f94-8759-163302cb1aef.dat' reference.fa && lofreq faidx reference.fa 2>&1 || echo "Error running samtools faidx for indexing fasta reference for lofreq" >&2 &&  ln -s '/galaxy/server/database/objects/4/f/9/dataset_4f9d0991-0981-43cc-8a02-c0eee299af3d.dat' reads.bam && ln -s -f '/galaxy/server/database/objects/_metadata_files/c/e/1/metadata_ce1ca465-186d-4d67-a53f-9efcbee94592.dat' reads.bam.bai &&   lofreq call-parallel --pp-threads ${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} --verbose  --ref 'reference.fa' --out variants.vcf --call-indels   --min-cov 5 --max-depth 1000000  --min-bq 30 --min-alt-bq 30    --min-mq 0 --max-mq 255 --min-jq 0 --min-alt-jq 0 --def-alt-jq 0  --sig 0.0005 --bonf dynamic --no-default-filter  reads.bam 2>&1  || (tool_exit_code=$? && cat "$TMPDIR/lofreq2_call_parallel*/*.log" 1>&2 && exit $tool_exit_code)
metrics.tool_stdout:
